title: The ONLY Indicator with ZERO False Signals! [Used by Professionals]
thesis_bullets: Alright, to add this indicator, here we click on indicators and we search dual range volume profile, this one which is written by someone named Uncle the Shooter.
Alright, this is the indicator and as you can see it's added here on the right side of the chart.
As the name of the indicator is telling us, this is a volume profile indicator but we have two histograms here and this new volume profile indicator.
In other words, the indicator uses two different price ranges to calculate and show volume profile.
This is main profile and this is pivot profile.

For the main profile, for the data range that is visible on the price chart, in simple words for the candles that you can see on the price chart, the indicator uses this look back period to calculate and show this volume profile.
So for this volume profile, the data from here up to now from this low to this high, the data is used in building this volume profile.
From the lowest low to the highest high, this price range is divided into 100 equals bins or segments.
So here for this price range, we have 100 bins or segments.
And for each bin or segment that is representing that price range, the traded volume in that price range is calculated and shown by the help of these horizontal volume bars.

hypotheses.statement: BTC continuation edge appears when signal alignment persists on 1h.
hypotheses.rationale: Research and indicator mentions converge on trend-continuation logic with confirmation filters.
hypotheses.falsifiable_test: Backtest BTC on 1h: require >=55% win rate and positive expectancy over 200+ trades; reject if unmet.

candidate_signals.description: Enter only when primary trend signal and confirmation filter agree on bar close.

combo_proposals.description: Confirm long only when Volume Delta Safe Algo Overlay bullish pressure is above control level (>=30) on 1h bar close.

strategy_heuristics_used: Every hypothesis should include explicit regime assumptions and invalidate conditions.
Separate signal logic from execution logic to reduce confounded performance attribution.
Require risk gating concepts before scaling complexity in entry or exit rules.
automation_heuristics_used: Keep human approval checkpoints for high-impact automation and deployment transitions.
Enforce deterministic session gating before any live-capable execution pathway is enabled.
Invest first in telemetry for risk, latency, and execution drift before adding new automation features.
